name: Neogen Chemicals Limited
summary: Neogen Chemicals Limited manufacturers and sells bromine and lithium based specialty chemicals in India. It offers organo bromine compounds, such as alkyl bromide compounds, dibromo alkane compounds, and bromo chloro alkanes; specialty chemical compounds; grignard reagents; advance intermediates; inorganic bromine compounds; and lithium salts. The company also provides custom synthesis and contract manufacturing services. It serves pharmaceutical, agrochemical, engineering, flavour and fragrance, electronic-chemical, refrigeration, construction chemicals, pharmaceutical, and specialty polymer industries, as well as heating, ventilation, and air-conditioning industries. The company also exports its products to 27 countries. Neogen Chemicals Limited was founded in 1989 and is based in Thane, India.
